title: A Lamdang Tangthu La Sa Ning

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A lamdang tangthu lasa ning
Jesuh si hi kei tang ding
Lim lang tui thuk gei ki khop
ciang
Mi siangtho te tawh sa ning

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A gammangte Jesuh’n zong hi
Lam a khial tuu te zong hi
A khut tawh kei mah hong pom
hi
Lampi ah hong kha kik hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Cinate Jesuh’n dam sak a
A kipukte zong phong hi
Mittaw in a lau na tam a
A hih
hang hong gum ding hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Khuamial kei tungah hong tung ta
Dahna lampi ka zui ta
Kei hong ompih in Topa aw
Hong
keem in lam hong hilh ta

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Sihna gun gal kah mateng in
Topa in hong cing ding hi
I itte tawh kimu ding in
Gungal
ah hong kha ding hi
